_note: This is the starting point for pipeline.history.json — the candidate/attempt-log sidecar that sits beside godot/assets/tiles/v2/pipeline.json. A brand-new set starts EMPTY: an empty object {} (the sidecar may even be absent — scripts read a missing file as {}). It fills in as seeds generate, keyed itemId -> keyframeId -> candidate[]. Nothing is ever deleted from it; failed/rejected candidates stay as the audit trail.

<tile_family_variant>.reason: off-palette: drifted off the locked ramp

_candidateFields: idx (int, = the on-disk NN), path (relative to pipeline.json's dir, v2/), status (requested|generated|failed|rejected|approved), llm (pass|fail, optional), reason (string, optional, on failed/rejected). Matched everywhere by the idx FIELD, not array position.
